chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3397 of 2011 CP D 3383 of 2011 CP D 3384 of 2011 CP D 3398 of 2011 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on CMA No.33109/2017 2. For hearing on CMA No.15653/2011 3. For hearing of main case. 15-05-2025 Mr. Habib Ahmed Qazi, advocate for petitioners Mr. Khursheed Javed along with Ms. Nazia Siddiqui, advocates for respondent/KDA Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Learned counsel for petitioners submits upon instructions that the notices have been superseded by subsequent notices and the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. It is stated that any grievance in respect to such notices shall be agitated before the forum of competent jurisdiction without prejudice to the present petitions. It is concluded that in view of the foregoing these petitions may be disposed of having served their purpose. Order accordingly. Office to place copy hereof in connected petitions. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
